2004July 4, 2004

🇬🇧 Bath, United Kingdom

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Bath, United Kingdom, July 4, 2004 -- July 9, 2004

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2004-07-bath-united-kingdom

15 Resolutions

619Plenary
Narrow scope of ISO 13584-501 and coordinate on industrial process control
SC 4 requests WG 2 to narrow the scope of ISO 13584-501 to deal only with environment measuring instruments and laboratory measuring instruments.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
618Plenary
Initiate liaison to ISO/TC 37
SC 4 requests its secretariat to initiate a liaison to ISO/TC 37 with a statement describing the ongoing work within SC 4/WG 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
617Plenary
Require future SC 4 meeting hosts to provide budget plans
As part of the ongoing programme of action to reduce meeting costs, all hosts of future SC 4 meetings are required to provide a budget plan for the meeting to the secretariat of SC 4 as part of the...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
616Plenary
Form Category A liaison with POSC Caesar Association and appoint Nils Sandsmark
SC 4 accepts the request from the POSC Caesar Association to form a two-way Category A liaison, requests the Secretariat to confirm their eligibility with ISO CS, and appoints Nils Sandsmark as lia...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
615Plenary
Form Category A liaison with USPI-NL and appoint Paul van Exel
SC 4 accepts the request from the Uitgebreid Samenwerkingsverband Proces Industrie Nederland (USPI-NL) to form a two-way Category A liaison, requests the Secretariat to confirm their eligibility wi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
614Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with UNSPSC and appoint John McInerney
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 welcomes the approach from UNSPSC (United Nations Standard Products and Services Codes), and agrees to establish a Category A liaison with UNSPSC, and nominates John McInerney as li...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
613Plenary
Reappoint Wolfgang Wilkes as Convener of WG 2
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Dr. Wilkes to serve as Convener of WG 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
612Plenary
Request ISO/TMB to co-locate JWG 1 meetings with SC 4/WG 2 and IEC SC 3 D
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 respectfully request ISO/TMB to encourage the venue of future ISO/IEC JWG 1 (Product properties and families) meetings to be planned in conjunction with ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 2 and IEC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
611Plenary
Nominate SC 4 delegates to ISO/IEC JWG 1
SC 4 nominates Hiroshi Murayama, Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes, Professor Guy Pierra, Dr Gerry Radack, Dr Tim King, Dr Norman Swindells, Dr Nils Sandsmark and Mr. Ping Wang as delegates to the first meeting ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
610Plenary
Appoint Torbjorn Holm as SC 4 PPC Convenor
SC 4 appoints Mr. Torbjorn Holm as ISO/TC 184/SC 4 PPC Convenor, in succession to Mr. Alain Bezos, with immediate effect.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
609Plenary
Reappoint Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convener of WG 12
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Jochen Haenisch to serve as Deputy Convener of WG 12.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
608Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0239 |Nigel Shaw | |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
